General.Name: Chanjet Information Technology
General.Description: Chanjet Information Technology Company Limited engages in the cloud service and software businesses in Mainland China and internationally. The company provides platform services, application services, and value-added data-based services for micro and small-scale enterprises. It is also involved in the technical development, consulting, transfer, service, and training of computer software, and hardware and external devices; sale of typing paper, computer consumables, computer software, and hardware and external devices; provision of database and internet information services; agency bookkeeping; and design, manufacturing, agency, and publication of advertisements. The company was formerly known as Chanjet Software Company Limited. Chanjet Information Technology Company Limited was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China. Chanjet Information Technology Company Limited is a subsidiary of Yonyou Network Technology Co., Ltd.
